body.title: Install Tailscale+xRDP and Chrome Remote Desktop on akiendelllinux
body.result: Akien confirmed done — Tailscale+xRDP and Chrome Remote Desktop installed on akiendelllinux
body.description:
Set up two remote desktop options so akiendelllinux is accessible from anywhere over the internet without VPN config or port forwarding.

**1. Tailscale + xRDP** (primary — also enables SSH, web UI access, daemon control)
```
curl -fsSL https://tailscale.com/install.sh | sh
sudo tailscale up
sudo apt install xrdp
```
Connect from Windows via built-in Remote Desktop app using the Tailscale IP.

**2. Chrome Remote Desktop** (secondary — browser-only fallback)
```
wget https://dl.google.com/linux/direct/chrome-remote-desktop_current_amd64.deb
sudo dpkg -i chrome-remote-desktop_current_amd64.deb
```
Then activate at remotedesktop.google.com with Google account.

**Affected files:** none (system install, no code changes)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** install + verify connection only. No firewall changes beyond what Tailscale requires.
**Test plan:** SSH to akiendelllinux via Tailscale IP from an external network. RDP session opens from Windows. Chrome Remote Desktop session opens from browser.
